subcodes.title: Words to Mr And Mrs Grosse, spoken on 1912-10-11
subcodes.first_line: The dinner was perfect. It was cooked most deliciously. Everything was very good. The dishes were very delicious. You worked very faithfully.
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @praise and encouragement, @being a source of light; guidance, @service to others; to the Cause of God
